name: pi-niphant
description: A personal toolbox of Pi extensions/skills and Droid plugins/instructions for daily agent harness work.

scripts.check: npm run check:packages && npm run check:skills
scripts.check:skills: mkdir -p .eval-results && node eval/scripts/static-contract-check.mjs --fail-on-violations && node eval/scripts/run-skill-eval.mjs --suite smoke --fail-on-failures > .eval-results/smoke.json
